sourceTitle: ELM - Edinburgh access to Language Models
evidenceSnippetOriginal: ELM is the University of Edinburgh's AI innovation platform, a central gateway providing safer access to Generative Artificial Intelligence (GAI) via access to Large Language Models (LLMs).
